pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Amazon CloudWatch Logs enables you to monitor, store, and access your system, application, and custom log files.
/See:/ <http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatchLogs/latest/APIReference/Welcome.html AWS API Reference>
/Warning:/ This is an experimental preview release which is still under heavy development and not intended for public consumption, caveat emptor!
